_info.name: Consilium MCP — Multi-AI Expert Council
_info.description: Multi-AI expert consensus platform. Multiple LLM agents deliberate around a boardroom table, debate complex queries using BFT-derived Consilium Protocol, and reach consensus via majority vote or ranked-choice. Treats model disagreement as an epistemic signal.

consilium.description: Consilium — summon a council of AI experts to deliberate and reach consensus on any question
